form.formComment: Returns from a break and was a winner at only other try fresh, which was at first career start scoring at Ballarat over 450m. Looks well placed here and expected to go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from a break and was a winner at only other try fresh, which was at first career start scoring at Ballarat over 450m. Looks well placed here and expected to go close.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Turned head inwards in home straight.

form.formComment: After failing to finish two starts back he came out and won comfortably by 4 lengths at Shepparton (25.20) beating Full Noise in a Mix 6/7 H on March 16. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: After failing to finish two starts back he came out and won comfortably by 4 lengths at Shepparton (25.20) beating Full Noise in a Mix 6/7 H on March 16. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Interference on turn out of back straight and fell.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when third (24.10) over 425m at this track. Drawn close to the inside. Top-three aspirations.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort last time when third (24.10) over 425m at this track. Drawn close to the inside. Top-three aspirations.

form.formComment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 4.5 lengths over 460m at Geelong in a handy 25.94, beating Magizoologist. Makes appeal on the back of that latest win.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 4.5 lengths over 460m at Geelong in a handy 25.94, beating Magizoologist. Makes appeal on the back of that latest win.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked turning out of back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when second (24.23) over 425m at this track. Drawn awkwardly. Others preferred.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort last time when second (24.23) over 425m at this track. Drawn awkwardly. Others preferred.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time in a Grade 6 at Shepparton when a 1.75 lengths second but did run a handy 22.26 over the 390m journey. Harder here and one for the multiples.

form.formComment: Modest effort last time out when fifth over 425m at this track. Tempted to look elsewhere.

formComments.comment: Modest effort last time out when fifth over 425m at this track. Tempted to look elsewhere.

form.formComment: Nearing another win after her success on March 12 at Warrnambool over 390m. Last start was second over 400m in 23.17, behind Paw Oppa. Has claims if at her best.

formComments.comment: Nearing another win after her success on March 12 at Warrnambool over 390m. Last start was second over 400m in 23.17, behind Paw Oppa. Has claims if at her best.

form.formComment: Showing promise but missed the frame last start when fifth at this track. Form solid prior to that including a win at this track three back. Looks a key chance here on best and given another chance.

formComments.comment: Showing promise but missed the frame last start when fifth at this track. Form solid prior to that including a win at this track three back. Looks a key chance here on best and given another chance.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won easily by 4 lengths at Horsham (23.11) beating Happy Dad in a Maiden on March 17. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.
